title: Gauge Conversion Calculator
hero: Adjust any pattern to your yarn or tension — no math, no guesswork.
description: Convert any pattern to match your gauge. Enter the pattern's gauge and your own, and this tool instantly recalculates your stitch and row counts—no math required.
excerpt: Adjust any pattern to your yarn or tension — no math, no guesswork.
whyUseThisTool: When your swatch doesn’t match the pattern, this tool tells you what to adjust — stitch size, tension dial, or stitch count — to get the outcome you want.
